'''magozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenotourism|oenotourism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenotourism|oenotourism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| magozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægezeth|mægezeth]] || [[word:mægezej|mægezej]] || [[word:mægezesh|mægezesh]] || [[word:mægeze|mægeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:magogozoth|magogozoth]] || [[word:magogozoj|magogozoj]] || [[word:magogozosh|magogozosh]] || [[word:magogozo|magogozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:magozoth|magozoth]] || [[word:magozoj|magozoj]] || [[word:magozosh|magozosh]] || [[word:magozo|magozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:magofzoth|magofzoth]] || [[word:magofzoj|magofzoj]] || [[word:magofzosh|magofzosh]] || [[word:magofzof|magofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:magozotho|magozotho]] || [[word:magozojo|magozojo]] || [[word:magozosho|magozosho]] || [[word:magozoko|magozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:magozoth|magozoth]] || [[word:magozoj|magozoj]] || [[word:magozosh|magozosh]] || [[word:magozo|magozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:magozothol|magozothol]] || [[word:magozojol|magozojol]] || [[word:magozoshol|magozoshol]] || [[word:magozokol|magozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:magozothotho|magozothotho]] || [[word:magozojojo|magozojojo]] || [[word:magozoshosho|magozoshosho]] || [[word:magozoko|magozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:magozothon|magozothon]] || [[word:magozojon|magozojon]] || [[word:magozoshon|magozoshon]] || [[word:magozokon|magozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:magozothoro|magozothoro]] || [[word:magozojoro|magozojoro]] || [[word:magozoshoro|magozoshoro]] || [[word:magozokoro|magozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
